prompt: Using the person in the uploaded photo as the reference subject. Vintage film photography style with pronounced film grain, authentic lighting and shadows, nostalgic color grading, and a Fuji-film aesthetic. The scene is set beside an old newspaper kiosk, with weathered driftwood stacked nearby and lush clusters of blooming orange-pink flowers. Rich film grain textures intertwine throughout the image, while a blurred background with motion trails and ghosting effects creates a strong surreal atmosphere. A captivating, enchanting young woman stands in profile, gently holding flowers. Her porcelain-cool skin appears delicate and translucent, while her refined facial features are softened by subtle motion blur. The subject’s silhouette slightly wavers with the panning camera movement, enhancing the dreamlike mood. Warm-toned, low-saturation color grading complements her long, softly glowing hair, which shimmers in the backlight. Loose, windblown strands sweep across her jawline, conveying both allure and danger. Her playful pose brings energy and charm to the composition, balancing sweetness with an intoxicating, mysterious beauty. Motion blur blends seamlessly with the film grain, creating a cinematic image that feels both modern and nostalgic, with strong influencer-style visual appeal and a rich storytelling atmosphere. The face should be naturally adjusted to harmonize with the overall image while preserving realism and consistency.
